summary: Excellent soundboard with crystal‑clear stereo mix, highlighting a blistering Cryptical Envelopment → The Other One sequence that puts Keith’s keyboards front‑and‑center while the whole band locks in.
review: The set is captured on a high‑quality 1971 soundboard with superb stereo definition and a clean mix that lets Keith’s organ shine without being washed out. Musically the show is praised for its fire‑breathing Cryptical/Drums/The Other One/Me & My Uncle suite, tight interplay among all members, and especially Jerry’s call‑and‑response work on The Other One. A few listeners note Bob’s rhythm guitar can be a bit recessed, but overall the performance is described as magical and near‑perfect.

ai_rating.rationale: Consistently high praise for both musical performance (standout sequences, tight interplay) and recording fidelity (clean soundboard, good stereo). Minor comment on Bob’s rhythm guitar does not detract from overall excellence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Very clean stereo mix with excellent definition; Keith’s organ is prominent and not washed out. One reviewer mentions Bob Weir's rhythm guitar is hard to locate, but overall clarity and balance are praised.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Reviewers highlight the seamless flow of the Cryptical → Drums → The Other One → Me & My Uncle segment, noting superb transitions and a high‑energy second set that keeps momentum throughout.

band_member_comments.Jerry: His call‑and‑response work on The Other One is described as amazing and ‘smoking fire’.
band_member_comments.Phil: Takes the lead role in the extended jam, with his bass driving the interplay.
band_member_comments.Bob: Rhythm guitar can be a bit buried for some listeners, though overall he contributes to the tight lock‑step performance.
band_member_comments.Keys: Keith’s organ is a highlight; reviewers say this may be his best performance and note he isn’t washed out in the mix.
band_member_comments.Drums: The drum segment receives strong praise for energy and cohesion within the extended sequence.
